name: Swiss American
message: Cheese engages all the senses. We believe that an amazing specialty food deserves an equally compelling label. Swiss American educates the public on the unique conditions that make the world’s best cheeses, starting with in-store packaging, informative displays, and engaging promotions. From private label to control brands, our artists bring their passion for cheese to everything we create; inviting hungry people everywhere to join us in the world of specialty cheeses.
